name: Supertone
description: Seoul-based AI voice intelligence platform — TTS, real-time voice change, de-noise and audio plugins.

seo.title: Supertone — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Supertone: Seoul-based AI voice intelligence platform — TTS, real-time voice change, de-noise and audio plugins.

when_to_use: Generating expressive AI singing and voice with emotional control
Cloning artist voices for music production and game audio
Building voice transformation features for audio apps
Deploying Korean-language TTS with rich prosodic expressiveness

pros: Real-time voice change with low latency
cons: Korean focus may limit voice library
Pricing tiers geared to studios, not devs
API surface less mature than rivals
review.verdict: Top-tier voice transformation for audio pros, less compelling as a general developer TTS API.
review.best_for: Podcast, game and broadcast studios needing real-time voice effects
review.not_for: Backend developers wanting a simple TTS REST API with broad voice catalog
